steps.title: Emphasize the EVA duration
steps.content: The student wants to stress how long Ortega and Nair's EVA lasted. The relevant notes give the duration as 7 hours and 55 minutes and add that the EVA is among the longest completed spacewalks to date.

steps.title: Choose the duration-focused sentence
steps.content: A explains what the astronauts did during the EVA but not how long it lasted. C says they completed an EVA during Expedition 14 but omits duration. D incorrectly uses the full mission dates as if they were the EVA's duration. The remaining choice foregrounds 7 hours and 55 minutes. The answer is B.
